name: Naruto Wisdom
description: Inspiring quotes from the world of Naruto — from ninjas who never gave up.
author: Naruto Fan

quotes.quote: I'm not gonna run away, I never go back on my word!
quotes.author: Naruto Uzumaki

quotes.quote: Hard work is worthless for those that don't believe in themselves.
quotes.author: Naruto Uzumaki

quotes.quote: A person grows up when he's able to overcome hardship.
quotes.author: Jiraiya

quotes.quote: Those who break the rules are scum, but those who abandon their friends are worse than scum.
quotes.author: Obito Uchiha

quotes.quote: The pain of being alone is completely out of this world.
quotes.author: Naruto Uzumaki

quotes.quote: When people get hurt, they learn to hate. When people hurt others, they become hated.
quotes.author: Nagato
